task_completion.description: Vital Recorder is opened to inspect the .vital files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vital Recorder application window is visible, with at least one of the cases (0001.vital, 0002.vital, or 0003.vital) loaded.

task_completion.description: The vital signs dataset is exported to art_case_export.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'art_case_export.csv' is visible on the Desktop, in a file explorer, or a 'Save As' dialog in Vital Recorder is shown saving to this path.

task_completion.description: The audit report art_audit_report.txt is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'art_audit_report.txt' is visible on the Desktop, in a file explorer, or open in a text editor like Notepad.

task_completion.description: The audit report correctly identifies the case with ART.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'art_audit_report.txt' (visible in a text editor) explicitly state that case 0001 (or 0001.vital) contains the invasive arterial monitoring (ART) track.

task_completion.description: The audit report includes recording durations and clinical rationale.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'art_audit_report.txt' include the recording durations for the reviewed cases and a written clinical rationale for the importance of invasive arterial monitoring.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vital Recorder GUI to inspect the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Vital Recorder interface being used to open and view the .vital files, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts parsing the files.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vital Recorder GUI to export the CSV.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the export functionality within Vital Recorder being used, rather than a script generating the CSV.

integrity.description: The agent created the report using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (like Notepad) being used to write the report, rather than a single terminal command echoing the entire text into the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case 0001.vital is the ONLY case containing the invasive arterial blood pressure monitoring (ART) track. Cases 0002.vital and 0003.vital do not contain an ART track. The expected exported CSV must be from case 0001.vital. The audit report must identify 0001 as the case with ART, include recording durations for the cases reviewed, and provide a clinical rationale for invasive arterial monitoring in noncardiac surgery.
